title: SlugLabs
description: Built a UCSC lab matchmaker that scrapes research opportunities, normalizes them into PostgreSQL, and serves fast keyword-based search for students exploring labs.

title: Portfolio Website
description: Designed and developed a personal multi-page site to showcase projects, contact details, and resume content with reusable HTML, CSS, and JavaScript components.

title: AI and Data Work
description: Created course and side projects in machine learning, analytics, and product-focused software that connect data insights with practical user experiences.

title: Triton Pantry Finder
description: Prototyped a campus resource finder that helps students locate nearby food and support resources using searchable location data and simple web maps.

title: CPU Simulator
description: Implemented a low-level simulator for a simplified instruction set architecture to strengthen systems thinking around memory, control flow, and debugging.

title: Campus Event Recommender
description: Explored recommendation logic for student events by organizing event metadata and matching interests to improve discovery and campus engagement.

title: Study Group Matcher
description: Built a lightweight matching workflow that groups students by schedule and course interests to make forming study groups less manual.

title: Sales Dashboard
description: Analyzed sales data in dashboards that surface trends, category performance, and summary metrics for quick decision-making.

title: Health Habit Tracker
description: Created a tracker for everyday health habits with simple summaries, progress monitoring, and a clean interface focused on consistency.

title: Gesture Recognition Demo
description: Experimented with computer vision pipelines to recognize simple gestures and translate them into interactive software actions.

title: Resume Ranker
description: Tested ranking ideas for resumes and job descriptions by extracting keywords and scoring alignment to support quicker screening.

title: Personal Finance Visualizer
description: Built interactive finance views that make spending categories, balances, and trends easier to understand over time.
